title: Moderation Update – 2026-04-29
body:
Actions taken today:

• spam_wave_42 — BANNED (phishing links across 6 channels)
• toxic_runner — BANNED (repeated targeted harassment of newcomers)
• bot_like_user_77 — WARNED (suspicious automated replies in help channels)

Reports involving trusted members (report_003, report_006) were reviewed and no sanctions applied — one was a community dispute, the other a confirmed false positive.

Remaining low-severity report (report_004) deferred for manual review.

Stay safe out there. 🛡️
